response.justification: Bogdan brings 17+ years of full-stack expertise with current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq—directly addressing an explicit yet rarely-found requirement. His production experience at scale (Dunnhumby millions req/sec, Optilyz millions mails/year) paired with deep TypeScript/Node.js mastery across senior roles satisfies core technical needs. React and Nest.js represent framework learning curves, but his polyglot mastery (10+ languages), TDD discipline, and proven ability to ship across diverse backends position him to acquire new frameworks swiftly. His engineering fundamentals—architecture, testing rigor, and scalability—are demonstrably mature.
